message:
fix(parser): improve assertion diagnostic in dot_edge_group test

Enhance the `dot_edge_group_expands_to_multiple_edges` test assertion
to include edge count, node count, and warnings in the failure message.
This makes debugging easier when the assertion fails by surfacing the
actual parser state instead of a static string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
